title: Direct Depth Separation Argument for P≠NP

analysis.object: T924: Direct Depth Separation Argument for P≠NP depth analysis

argument_statement.description: Attempt: EML-2 ≠ EML-inf (structural). P=EML-2 (T232). NP-complete ⊂ EML-inf (T232). Therefore P ≠ NP-complete. Therefore P ≠ NP.

step1_structure.description: Step 1: EML-2 ≠ EML-inf. The five strata are DISTINCT BY DEFINITION (T110, T816). This step is solid.

step2_p_eml2.description: Step 2: P = EML-2. Every polynomial-time algorithm is an EML-2 computation (measurable, logarithmic depth). This step is solid from T232 anchor.

step3_np_emlinf.description: Step 3: NP-complete ⊂ EML-inf. This is THE question. T232 says search is EML-inf. But is T232's NP characterization a THEOREM or a CONJECTURE?

t232_status.description: T232 status: it was stated as a theorem in the framework. But was it PROVED or asserted? The proof of T232 was via the game tractability correspondence. NP-search = EML-inf because: no finite composition of EML operators solves NP-complete in polynomial depth.

logical_gap.description: The logical gap: T232 says search is EML-inf, but this is essentially circular (it assumes P≠NP to classify NP as EML-inf). The direct argument is valid IF T232 is independently proved.
logical_gap.reason: Gap: T232 NP classification may presuppose P≠NP

t924_theorem.description: T924: Direct depth separation argument is valid modulo T232 independence. The gap: T232 classifies NP-complete as EML-inf, but this classification may presuppose P≠NP. If T232 is independently proved (not circular), P≠NP follows directly. The depth separation IS the proof. T924.
t924_theorem.reason: Direct argument valid modulo T232 independence

analysis.theorem: T924: Direct Depth Separation Argument for P≠NP (S1204).

key_theorem: T924: Direct Depth Separation Argument for P≠NP (S1204).
